notes: Fun fact: Switzerland has more banks than dentists. The country is also home to CERN, where the World Wide Web was invented. Not bad for a country smaller than New Jersey.
highlights: Liked: The precision. Everything runs exactly on time. Trains, events, meals. After Kenya, it felt like stepping into a simulation.
Did not like: The cost of living is staggering. A basic lunch costs what a full week of meals costs back home.
